tasks.bundle: deno compile --allow-net --allow-run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-sys --unstable-sloppy-imports --output=../../dist/sq-osc src/index.ts && deno task docs
tasks.bundle:windows: deno compile --allow-net --allow-run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-sys --unstable-sloppy-imports --target=x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --output=../../dist/sq-osc-windows.exe src/index.ts && deno task docs
tasks.bundle:linux: deno compile --allow-net --allow-run --allow-read --allow-write --allow-env --allow-sys --unstable-sloppy-imports --target=x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --output=../../dist/sq-osc-linux src/index.ts && deno task docs
